data_source: GitHub MCP API — first-100 sample (sorted by updatedAt DESC) + API total count

health_summary.note: Age buckets require full dataset. Sample-100 (most-recently-updated) shows all as 'active'. Full distribution estimated from label patterns.

unclassified.note: 10 unclassified in first-100 sample; scaled to ~87 for full 868

priority_issues.note: No 'P1' label in use. Priority is signaled via BUG label or triage labels.
